---
id: get-ems-trend-space
title: "Get Energy Consumption Trend of a Space"
description: "Get the total energy consumption trend for all devices within a specified space by a given time dimension (1h/1d/month). The API returns the energy consumption value for each time interval."
sidebar_label: "Get Energy Consumption Trend of a Space"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Energy Consumption Trend of a Space"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/ems/trend/space"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the total energy consumption trend for all devices within a specified space by a given time dimension (1h/1d/month). The API returns the energy consumption value for each time interval.

:::tip
Only devices within the space that provide energy consumption data will be included. For details, refer to the Aqara Studio documentation on [Energy Management](https://docs.aqara.com/docs/aqara-studio/energy-management-system#prerequisites).
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["startTime","endTime","spaceId","dimension"],"properties":{"startTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Start time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds).","example":1704067200000},"endTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"End time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds).","example":1706745600000},"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID (automatically identifies home or room).","example":"room_001"},"dimension":{"type":"string","description":"Aggregation dimension","enum":["1h","1d","month"],"example":"1d"}},"title":"EmsTrendSpaceRequest"},"examples":{"dailyTrend":{"value":{"startTime":1704067200000,"endTime":1706745600000,"spaceId":"room_001","dimension":"1d"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
